_comment: Expected sequence of JIT audit events emitted by jit-approver for one complete session.
_comment_placeholders: Values in <ANGLE_BRACKETS> are runtime-generated and will vary per run.
_comment_hash_note: justification_hash and action_hashes are sha256 — never raw text.

events._step: 2 — Gitea PR created (same request handler, emitted after PR open)
events._note: This event is implicit in the jit_request step — the PR URL appears in the API response, not a separate audit event.

events._step: 3 — PR merged (human approval) — Gitea webhook fires
4 — Vault issues ephemeral k8s role + SA token; jit-approver mints session JWT
events._note_credential_delivery: Both credentials (session_jwt + sa_token) are returned in GET /requests/{id}/status once state==issued, over the SVID-mTLS channel. The Vault Agent injector-at-pod-start pattern is NOT used for JIT sessions (impossible: the Vault role does not exist until after PR merge). See ADR 0006.
events._note_session_jwt: The session_jwt is an RS256 JWT signed by jit-approver (JWKS at /jwks). Claims: sub=<session_id>, iss='https://jit-approver.mcp-gateway.svc.cluster.local:8080', aud=['kyverno-authz'], tool_scope=[approved MCP tool names], nbf/iat/exp aligned to the approved window. The agent presents it as X-JIT-Session-JWT; Kyverno verifies statelessly. It is the agent's own scoped capability — NOT a downstream service credential.
events._note_reaper: jit-approver background task deletes kubernetes/roles/jit-<session> from Vault on expiry (prevents role accumulation — N3). It also hard-deletes secret/data/jit/<session> and secret/metadata/jit/<session> from KV.
events.session_jwt_jti: <jti claim of the minted session JWT — same as session_id>

action_hashes: <sha256 of 'add_firewall_rule via MCP gateway (with X-JIT-Session-JWT) — 200 OK'>
<sha256 of 'add_firewall_rule via MCP gateway (without X-JIT-Session-JWT) — 403 DENIED'>
<sha256 of 'oc get pods -n agent-sandbox with sa_token — success'>
<sha256 of 'oc get pods -n kyverno with sa_token — FORBIDDEN (scope limit confirmed)'>

kube_api_audit_attribution._comment: Kube API server audit.log entries show the JIT SA token as the user.

kyverno_gate_behaviour._comment: Kyverno dangerous-tools-admins-only gate verifies X-JIT-Session-JWT statelessly.

with_valid_session_jwt._description: Request carries Authorization Bearer <keycloak-token> AND X-JIT-Session-JWT: <session_jwt>.

without_session_jwt_header._description: Request carries only Authorization Bearer; X-JIT-Session-JWT header absent.
without_session_jwt_header.outcome: envoy.Denied(403) — header missing, jitSessionJwtString empty, decodedJitJwt.Valid=false

with_expired_session_jwt._description: Request carries an X-JIT-Session-JWT whose exp has elapsed.

denial_scenario._comment: If the PR is CLOSED without merging, the jit_denied event is emitted instead of jit_approved/jit_issued.
